active_incidents.description: Fan reported chest pain near Gate C concession stand. Medical team alerted.
active_incidents.notes: Patient is conscious. Defibrillator brought to scene. EMS en route.
ai_recommended_actions: Direct crowd away from Gate C to Gate D
Keep radio channel 1 clear for medical team
Notify Gate D volunteers to expect overflow

active_incidents.description: Unverified report of ticket fraud attempt. Two individuals using copied QR codes.
active_incidents.notes: Stadium security and FIFA officials notified. Individuals held at Gate A security office.
ai_recommended_actions: Do not escalate visibly in crowd
Quietly direct other fans to adjacent turnstiles

active_incidents.description: Crowd density at Gate C approaching unsafe levels. Queue backed up 520 people.
active_incidents.notes: Related to ongoing medical incident – Gate C throughput reduced.
ai_recommended_actions: Immediately redirect fans to Gate D
Deploy barrier management at Gate C front
Announce Gate D availability over PA system
Request 4 additional volunteers from unassigned pool

resolved_incidents.description: Lost child, age 7. United with parent after 12 minutes.
Heat exhaustion. Fan treated with water and shade. Recovered.

weather.advisory: Heat index elevated. Encourage fans to hydrate. Monitor outdoor queues.
